generated_oml:
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
instance AECOBuildingSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building asset represented as a cyber-physical system",
    base:contains DTFramework, BuildingControlEngineersRole, FacilityManagersRole, DTEngineersRole, TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, CO2Sensor, LightingActuator
]
instance DTFramework : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized architecture hub coordinating roles including Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers"
]
instance BuildingControlEngineersRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role responsible for device modeling and deployment within BIM"
]
instance FacilityManagersRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role responsible for real-time monitoring and control"
]
instance DTEngineersRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role responsible for service integration"
]
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor defined within BIM by Building Control Engineers for runtime monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]
instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor defined within BIM by Building Control Engineers for runtime monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]
instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO2 sensor defined within BIM by Building Control Engineers for runtime monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]
instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]
instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]
instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]
instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]
instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time CO2 data from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange platform",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]
instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange platform",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]
instance UnrealEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Rich, interactive visualization platform",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]
instance MDEEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering engine for generating deployable DT artifacts",
    DTDFVocab:enables DTArtifactsService
]
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Foundational geometric model enriched with semantic annotations for BCS components",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEngine
]
instance DTMergedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Integrated model combining BIM and runtime data for digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine
]
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time monitoring and control for Facility Managers",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, LightingControlAction
]
instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides predictive analytics for infrastructure management",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]
instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides optimization services for infrastructure management",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]
instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides interactive visualization interfaces for Facility Managers",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]
instance DTArtifactsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for generating deployable Digital Twin artifacts using MDE",
    DTDFVocab:provides DeployedArtifactsInsight
]
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time status of building systems for Facility Managers"
]
instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for infrastructure maintenance and optimization"
]
instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization insights for energy efficiency and operational performance"
]
instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of building systems for Facility Managers"
]
instance DeployedArtifactsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deployed Digital Twin artifacts for simulation and analysis"
]
instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control signal for lighting systems",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system actuator defined within BIM by Building Control Engineers"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Bidirectional communication enabling control signals to be transmitted from the digital twin to physical Building Control Systems (BCS), with no specific technical details provided in the document regarding command types, formats, or validation mechanisms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points supporting custom service and analytics integration, where the DT Framework serves as a central hub for bidirectional data exchange enabling holistic building life cycle management"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environments where Building Control Engineers define sensors, actuators, and controllers to address BIM's limitations in representing Building Control System (BCS) components. Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles transform enriched BIM models into structured representations for automatic generation of deployable DT artifacts. Real-time data exchange ensures continuous synchronization between physical and digital twins, while interactive visualization provides immersive interfaces for Facility Managers to monitor and control operations. The modular architecture with standardized extension points enables DT Engineers to integrate custom services and analytics, facilitating lifecycle governance through role-specific responsibilities."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validity is assessed using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure alignment between the Digital Twin and physical counterpart, with validation performed after model creation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto serve as the central hub for real-time data exchange, with no specific details on network topology, protocols, bandwidth, latency, or security protocols provided in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems addressed through non-functional requirements (NF_X), with modular architecture and standardized extension points enabling integration of custom services and analytics"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards as the foundational specification for device modeling and semantic representation, ensuring compatibility with AECO-specific systems and standards for construction project complexity requirements."
]
